title: Auth middleware & route protection
description: Central logic to validate tokens and restrict access by role.

subtasks.title: middleware.js edge check
subtasks.description: Verify JWT presence/validity for protected route groups (/admin, /driver, /passenger) and redirect to /login if missing/invalid.

subtasks.title: Server-side role guard helper
subtasks.description: Reusable function used inside API route handlers to confirm req user's role matches the required role before proceeding.

subtasks.title: Refresh token endpoint
subtasks.description: POST /api/auth/refresh — issues a new access token using a valid refresh token.
